title: The weighted P0 projection residual is orthogonal to constants

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonzero total mass, the weighted projection residual has zero weighted inner product with every constant c.
assumptions: c is a real constant test value
the residual is measured relative to the weighted average
informal.expected_conclusion: The mass-weighted residual is orthogonal to the constant test value.

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_orthogonal_const
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_orthogonal_const (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c = 0

tasks.input: Translate weighted residual orthogonality to constant test functions for a two-cell P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_orthogonal_const (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c = 0

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by factoring out c and using the zero weighted-mean residual lemma.
tasks.target: Rewrite the expression as the weighted residual sum times c, then use weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero.

tasks.input: Find the LeanNumerics lemma that turns the weighted residual sum into zero.
